summary: Prepare for a fundraising round with strategy, materials, investor targeting, and outreach planning.

inputs.name: company_stage
inputs.description: Current company stage, traction, and key milestones achieved.

inputs.name: funding_target
inputs.description: Target raise amount and planned use of funds.

inputs.name: existing_materials
inputs.description: Existing pitch deck, financial model, or data room contents.

outputs.name: fundraising_strategy
outputs.description: Complete fundraising strategy with timeline and approach.

outputs.name: investor_targets
outputs.description: Prioritized investor list with thesis alignment notes.

outputs.name: materials_checklist
outputs.description: Complete list of required materials with status.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is fundraising preparation, not investor outreach execution.
Require company stage and funding target before planning.
Strategy must include investor targets matched to thesis and stage.

steps.action: Assess fundraising readiness based on stage, traction, and metrics.
Design round structure, sizing, and timeline.
Prepare or review pitch deck and supporting materials.
Prepare financial projections and data room contents.
Build prioritized investor list with thesis alignment.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read existing business documents, metrics, and prior analysis.

verification.method: Check readiness assessment covers stage, metrics, and team.
Check investor list has thesis-matched targets.
Check materials checklist covers all required documents.

success_criteria: Fundraising readiness is assessed with clear gaps identified.
Investor targets are matched to thesis, stage, and check size.
All required materials are listed with ownership and status.

rollback.when: If outputs invent metrics or misrepresent findings, roll back to raw inputs.
